prestazioni: Engine: Replace the stock L539 5.2L V10 hybrid powertrain with a bespoke twin-turbocharged 6.5L V12 derived from the Aventador SVJ (L539B), utilizing a custom dry-sump system by HPR (High Performance Racing) and forged internals from JE Pistons (24:1 compression ratio) paired with Carrillo H-beam connecting rods. Turbocharging via twin Garrett GTX5533R Gen II turbos with TiAL MV-R 44mm wastegates and a custom 4.5-inch titanium exhaust system by Capristo, featuring quad 100mm outlets and integrated electric cutouts.

Hybrid System: Retain the Asterion’s 300hp electric motor (ZF AVE 130) but upgrade the battery pack to a custom 800V lithium-ion array by Kreisel Electric, increasing capacity to 32 kWh and enabling 0-60 mph in 2.4s in full hybrid mode. Integrate a MoTeC M190 ECU with custom hybrid torque-splitting maps for seamless power delivery, calibrated by HGP Turbo (Germany) for 1,200+ hp combined output.

Drivetrain & Suspension: Replace the stock Haldex AWD system with a Quaife ATB helical LSD and a custom 7-speed dual-clutch transmission by Getrag (model 7DCL750), reinforced with a Pankl Racing Systems carbon-fiber driveshaft. Suspension overhaul includes Öhlins TTX46 coilovers with 3-way adjustable damping, custom valving for the Asterion’s 50:50 weight distribution, and a full carbon-fiber subframe by Dymag to reduce unsprung weight by 18%. Braking via AP Racing CP9660 6-piston calipers with 420mm carbon-ceramic rotors (CCM-X) and Ferodo DS3000 pads.
estetica: Aero: Full carbon-fiber widebody conversion by Liberty Walk (LB-WORKS Asterion kit), featuring extended front fenders with integrated canards, a custom 3D-printed rear diffuser by Novitec, and an active rear wing derived from the Huracán Performante (adjustable via Lamborghini’s ALA 2.0 system). Front splitter upgraded with a 3-piece adjustable design by Vorsteiner, including a removable center section for track use.

Lighting & Details: Replace all exterior lighting with custom LED units by Diode Dynamics, including sequential turn signals and a full-width rear light bar inspired by the Sian FKP 37. Carbon-fiber side skirts with integrated air curtains by Rocket Bunny, and a custom titanium exhaust finisher by Akrapović. Wheels: Forged 21x10.5 (front) and 22x12.5 (rear) HRE FF01 in a custom satin bronze finish, wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (265/30 R21 front, 325/25 R22 rear).

Interior: Full Alcantara and carbon-fiber trim by Sabelt, including a custom roll cage by Matter Fab with integrated fire suppression system (Lifeline Zero 360). Seats replaced with Sparco Pro 2000 carbon-kevlar buckets, paired with a custom steering wheel by MOMO (carbon-fiber with integrated MoTeC C127 dash display). Door panels redesigned with custom aluminum switchgear by Carlex Design, featuring hybrid system monitoring and launch control toggles.
